achievements.title: Woah! Not So Fast!
achievements.description: Check the Forum Topic for important information
achievements.author: DoctorV

achievements.title: The Tired Old Woodsman
achievements.description: Help out a poor old woodsman in Green Hill Zone

achievements.description: Meet with the GUN Commander in Central City
achievements.author: DoctorV

achievements.title: It's-a-Me, Sonic!
achievements.description: Clear the pipe puzzle in Central City without purchasing any hints
achievements.author: DoctorV

achievements.title: Queen of the Swarm
achievements.description: Help a frightened man get rid of the wasps in Central City
achievements.author: DoctorV

achievements.title: Mechanical Muggers
achievements.description: Help a GUN agent by taking down a gang of robot muggers in Central City
achievements.author: DoctorV

achievements.description: Clear the vent puzzle in Mystic Ruins without purchasing any hints

achievements.title: The Search for Knuckles
achievements.description: Locate and rescue Knuckles
achievements.author: DoctorV

achievements.title: Honesty Can Be Painful
achievements.description: Remind the Forgetful Swatbot in Central City of what their true programming is, and defeat it in battle
achievements.author: DoctorV

achievements.title: I Am the Ultimate Life Form!
achievements.description: Pick a fight with Shadow and defeat him in Mystic Ruins
achievements.author: DoctorV

achievements.title: Buyer Beware!
achievements.description: Help the shopkeeper in Central City recover his prized stapler
achievements.author: DoctorV

achievements.title: Bridging the Gap
achievements.description: Clear the bridge puzzle in Green Hill Zone without purchasing any hints

achievements.description: Save a young boy from a Giant Scorpion, and escort him home safely to Central City
achievements.author: DoctorV

achievements.title: Cream and Cheese
achievements.description: Have Cream join your party after helping to find and return her friend Cheese in Green Hill Zone
achievements.author: DoctorV

achievements.title: Norton is Missing
achievements.description: Help Big and Froggy find their missing friend Norton in Green Hill Zone
achievements.author: DoctorV

achievements.title: Stop the Signal
achievements.description: Help Dr. Madden with finding and stopping the cause of the aggressive animals in Green Hill Zone

achievements.description: Track down and confront Eggman

achievements.description: Provide some reading material for the man in the booth in Blue Ridge Zone
achievements.author: DoctorV

achievements.description: Speak to the worker after delivering his warning to the foreman at the factory in Blue Ridge Zone
achievements.author: DoctorV

achievements.title: Timmy's in Trouble!
achievements.description: Help a troubled father save his boy Timmy in Blue Ridge Zone
achievements.author: DoctorV

achievements.description: Help escort a GUN officer to Station Square in Blue Ridge Zone
achievements.author: DoctorV

achievements.description: Clear the subway door puzzle in Blue Ridge Zone without purchasing any hints

achievements.description: Help Shadow find his friend Omega

achievements.description: Make your way to Angel Island and face the leader of the Nocturnus Clan

achievements.description: Board the interdimensional rocket and blast off into the wormhole

achievements.description: Clear the conveyor puzzle in Kron Colony without purchasing any hints

achievements.description: Obtain a Chaos Emerald in Kron Colony and bring it back to the Cyclone

achievements.description: Find 5 pieces of Nocturnus Tech and give them to Rouge

achievements.description: Discover the truth behind the terrible Night Stalker and end its reign of terror
